message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor #FFFFE0
  BorderColor #FFD700
}

participant "Mojaloop Adapter" as MA
participant "API" as API
participant "api / Handler" as Handler
participant "Application Layer (domain / service / facade)" as AppLayer
participant "TigerBeetle Client" as TBClient
participant "TigerBeetle Cluster" as TBCluster
participant "MySQL" as MySQL

note right of MA: Hub operator or DFSP interactions
note right of API: NodeJS interface invokes REST API
note right of Handler: JSON request decoded & processed via handler
note right of AppLayer: Expose service functions & handle database interactions

rectangle "Central-Settlement" {
  API
  Handler
  AppLayer
}

rectangle "Storage" {
  TBClient
  TBCluster
  MySQL
}

rectangle "Update Settlement" {
  MA -> API: 1 JSON (settlement data)
  API -> Handler: 2 Invoke handler
  Handler -> AppLayer: 3 Invoke application layer
  AppLayer -> MySQL: 4 Retrieve settlement data (excluding accounts)
  AppLayer -> MySQL: 5 Retrieve accounts for all Transfers for a settlement window
  AppLayer -> MySQL: 6 Update settlement data (excluding accounts)
  AppLayer -> AppLayer: 7 Settlement state processing
  AppLayer -> TBClient: 8 Invoke account creation based on settlement state of each Transfer
  TBClient -> TBCluster: 9 Create settlement accounts & return result
  TBClient -> AppLayer: 10 Return settlement result
  AppLayer -> MySQL: 11 Update final settlement state & return result
  AppLayer -> Handler: 12 Return result
  Handler -> API: 13 Return result
  API -> MA: 14 Return result with settlementData
}

@enduml
